events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Since the photo set only documents the state after the ACI 301 hold point (with no evidence of the prerequisite reinforcement/formwork inspection and no signoff page attached), I flagged this as `needs_more_info` with `high` risk — concrete placement is irreversible, so the missing verification record needs to be resolved (or an NCR raised) before the sequence can be confirmed compliant.
